old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-8ile","title":"Add debug logging to TX/RX timeout handling","description":"Modify _handle_tx_end and _handle_rx_timeout methods in python/src/lichen/sim/simulation.py to add debug logging with detailed information about: node_id, tx_id/node_state, pending_txs/event_queue_len, current_time, and other relevant debugging information when these events are processed.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:44.480887Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-15T03:22:44.480949Z"}
